# Free Email Signature Generator

> A free, open-source HTML email signature generator. No sign-up, no tracking, no subscriptions. Runs entirely in the browser.

## What it does

This tool lets anyone create a professional HTML email signature in seconds. Fill in your details, pick your brand colours and font, and copy the signature directly into your email client. Everything runs client-side — nothing is sent to a server.

## URL

https://signatures.clarkemedia.ie

## Features

- Fully customizable: name, job title, company, phone, email, website, logo, accent colour, font, social links, disclaimer
- Live preview with light and dark mode
- One-click copy as rich text (paste into email client) or raw HTML source
- Blank fields are automatically hidden from the output
- Custom accent colour with colour picker
- Social icons: LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub
- Optional confidentiality disclaimer with auto-bold formatting
- Step-by-step setup instructions for Outlook (new, classic, Mac), Gmail, and Apple Mail
- Logo upload from local files or via URL
- Web-safe fonts that render reliably across all email clients
- Table-based HTML layout for maximum email client compatibility
- Zero dependencies, single HTML file, no build step
- Works offline after loading
- Mobile responsive

## Who made it

Eoin McMahon at Clarke Media (https://clarkemedia.ie)

## License

MIT — completely free for personal and commercial use.

## Source code

https://github.com/clarkemedia/email-signature-generator

## Why use this instead of paid alternatives

- No account required
- No email address harvesting
- No branding or backlinks added to your signature
- No monthly fees or feature gates
- No data collection or tracking
- Open source — you can verify, fork, and self-host
- Works with every major email client

## Detailed info

For more detail see [llms-full.txt](https://signatures.clarkemedia.ie/llms-full.txt)
